definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">player_log_in</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="entity_has_achievement"><field name="achievement">CUSTOM:Awakened</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_add_achievement"><field name="achievement">CUSTOM:Awakened</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="entity_execute_command"><value name="command"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">/title @p title {"text":"Awakened!","color":"#FF3184","bold":false,"italic":false,"underlined":false,"strikethrough":false,"obfuscated":false}</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="entity_execute_command"><value name="command"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">/title @p subtitle {"text":"Find an Evaluator!","color":"#FF0000","bold":false,"italic":false,"underlined":false,"strikethrough":false,"obfuscated":false}</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="play_sound"><field name="sound">entity.wither.spawn</field><field name="soundcategory">neutral</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="level"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.7</field></block></value><value name="pitch"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></xml>
